resources.string: Browse and launch your most used apps with a single tap from any screen
Select your preferred neon accent color for the floating bubble and dashboard overlay
Adjust the floating bubble size dynamically on the screen (30dp to 80dp)
Required to render the quick action floating bubble on top of active screens.
Required to identify and arrange your installed apps by frequency of actual usage.
Keeps the background overlay service running smoothly without system interruption.
Please activate all the required permissions above to enable the background floating service.
This app was made for lazy people
Everything here happens inside your phone
This app is made for lazy people!
Orbit acts as a floating app launcher helper on your screen, letting you search and launch your favorite apps instantly with a single tap from anywhere.
Orbit runs 100% offline on your device, and your personal data never leaves your phone.
The developer has been notified about you!
A quick one-time ping was sent to Telegram to let us know you installed Orbit. No personal data was collected!
Usage Access permission is not enabled; apps sorted alphabetically.
No usage statistics found for the last 7 days; apps sorted alphabetically.
